text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Japanese Oaks. We arrive early
and are heading to the waiting room, when...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but do we have some time before we head
in?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to have a look at the course before I run.
Is there time?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove seems more nervous than usual. I
decide to okay her request.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first race hasn't even yet begun, but the
stands are quite full already.

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text:
We're gonna witness history today! I wanna see
the Empress follow in her mom's footsteps and
win the Japanese Oaks with my own eyes!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text: You said it! I really, really hope Air Groove wins!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's evident that the crowd has a heightened
interest in today's race—or perhaps I should say,
in Air Groove's performance today.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I wonder what was going through my mother's
mind when she took on the Japanese Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
How strange... To be here myself, yet thinking of
that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove has a point—it's not like her to be so
pensive.
choice_data_list: You've never asked her about it?
You've never asked her about it?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Once, but I was quite young at the time. I
remember how she responded even now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
"If you really want to know, then try running there
yourself."

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
"If you give the race everything you can muster,
I'm sure you'll understand how I felt." That's what
she told me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...What's with that look?
choice_data_list: You strike me as pretty different from her.
You strike me as pretty different from her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to the big questions, my mother
doesn't like to hand out answers. She believes it's
more effective to let you find them for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
She has a broad outlook that I can't hope to
fathom, and her words always have a deeper
meaning.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's only natural that you wouldn't understand her
words. Especially when I myself am still puzzling
over them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's tone is as abrasive as ever, but her
expression is slightly softer than usual when
speaking of her mother. She looks almost...
childlike.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together with the new perspective on what the
Japanese Oaks means to her, it makes me see her
in a new light.
choice_data_list:
I guess in the end, you'll just have to try it and
see.

I guess in the end, you'll just have to try it and
see.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh. To think you'd be the one to tell me that.
But you're absolutely right.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll do exactly as my mother said and give this
race everything I can muster.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'll show everyone that I can catch the queen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for wasting your time with this. Let's get
ready.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's that time of the year when nature blooms into
the fullness of its beauty!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Which of these dazzling young stars will take the
crown and become Queen of the Oaks?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Many eyes are cast upon Air Groove! Can she
follow in her mother's footsteps?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We can hear the cheers from the crowd even here.
Now, as for Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...All right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her state of intense focus gives her a more
dignified air than I've ever seen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I know. I'm going to surpass everyone's wildest
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The race is about to begin!
